sections.paragraph:
unused in Kal. Chald., Syr., and Sam. to nourish, to feed, to give food.

Hophal, Jer 5:8, כתיב סוּסִים מוּזָנִים, fed horses, i.e. fat. The קרי has מְיֻזָּנִים, which, according to Schultens, is derived from יָזַן, وزن in this sense: ponderibus instructi (pondera i.q. testes e.g. Catull. lxii. 5. Stat. Silv. iii. iv. 77), bene vasati. LXX. ἵπποι θηλυμανεῖς. Hence מָזֹון.

זון

Chald. id.

Ithpeal, fut. יִתְּזִין pass. Dan 4:9.

Derivative מָזֹון.
